title: Razorpay UPI Intent Instrument
description: Handler-level wrapper for the upi_intent instrument type used with com.razorpay.upi. Extends the base UPI Intent instrument schema and defines the available_upi_intent_instrument declaration for use in handler available_instruments.

available_upi_intent_instrument.title: Available UPI Intent Instrument
available_upi_intent_instrument.description: Declares support for the UPI Intent flow in handler available_instruments. No constraints are required — NPCI mandates generic intent support across all UPI apps.
